TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cameron_Bairstow, title = Cameron_Bairstow, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cameron_Bairstow} }

S.FORM: Cameron Bairstow, unu syubay kanasmali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput , u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay / tebanay mimaliay . Cameron Bairstow i 1914 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 49, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 12 bulad 7 demiad, 1990 a mihca, Cameron Bairstow, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶am…ôron bairstow, unu sjubaj kanasmar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput , u tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj / t…ôbanaj mimar~…æiaj . ¶am…ôron bairstow i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶ƒßi ¶ago bur~…ær~…æs putiput. ** bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶am…ôron bairstow, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Cameron Bairstow, unu syubay kanasmali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput , u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay / tebanay mimaliay . Cameron Bairstow i 1914 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 49, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 12 bulad 7 demiad, 1990 a mihca, Cameron Bairstow, miunduay.
